title: Anything SlashBlade
description: This mod lets you turn any item into a SlashBlade.
body:
Breakthrough Limits!!!!!!This mod overhauls the combat mechanics of "**[SlashBlade: Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped)**", pushing its weapon performance beyond conventional balance!!!​
All changes introduced by this mod are configurable via files, allowing players to toggle features on or off.

**Current Features:**
- ​Everything's a Blade - Transform any Minecraft item into a fully functional SlashBlade
- Seamless Integration - Perfectly compatible with all combat mechanics from SlashBlade: Resharped
- Easy Controls - Toggle between normal mode and SlashBlade mode with simple keybinds
- ​Visual Preservation - Converted blades retain the original item's appearance and texture
- JEI Compatible - Full support for recipe viewing with Just Enough Items
- True to Form​ - Perfectly retains the original item's combat stats



**If you have ideas or bugs,plz:**
[Issues · Arcomit/anythingslashblade](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade/issues)
or
[Pull requests · Arcomit/anythingslashblade](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade/pulls)

Github:
[Arcomit/anythingslashblade: 将你所见之物皆转换为拔刀剑](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade)

License：
[LGPL-2.1 license](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade/blob/master/LICENSE)

———————————————————

万物皆为刃 (AnythingSlashBlade) 是一个强大的 拔刀剑：重锋 附属模组，它能让游戏中的任何物品都能转化为强大的拔刀剑！无论是钻石、木棍、还是胡萝卜，只要你能想到，就能挥舞它们作为拔刀剑战斗。

**目前提供的特性：**
- 万物成刃 - 将任何 Minecraft 物品转化为可使用的拔刀剑；
- 无缝集成 - 完美兼容拔刀剑：重锋的所有战斗机制；
- 简单操作 - 通过快捷键轻松切换普通模式和拔刀剑模式；
- 保留外观 - 转化后的拔刀剑保留原物品的外观和材质；
- JEI 兼容 - 完整支持 JEI 配方查看；
- 特性保留 - 完美保留原物品的攻击特性；



**有想法或bug，请：**
[Issues · Arcomit/anythingslashblade](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade/issues)
或
[Pull requests · Arcomit/anythingslashblade](https://github.com/Arcomit/anythingslashblade/pulls)
